message:
style: address clippy lints in auth backoff and extension scoring functions

Fix clippy warnings introduced in the recent performance and scoring
refactors:

1. Auth lock backoff (src/auth.rs):
   - Reformatted checked_shl chain for line length compliance
   - Replaced `as u64` cast of subsec_nanos() with u64::from() to
     satisfy clippy::cast_lossless (u32 → u64 is always lossless)
   - Applied to both sync lock_file() and async lock_file_async()

2. Extension scoring (src/extension_scoring.rs):
   - Replaced (1.0 + x).ln() with x.ln_1p() for numerical precision
     (avoids catastrophic cancellation near zero) in score_github_stars,
     score_npm_downloads, and score_activity
   - Added #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] on f64 conversions from
     u64 (stars/downloads/days) where precision loss is acceptable
   - Added #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation, clippy::cast_sign_loss)]
     blocks around score.round() as u32 casts where the clamp to min(N)
     guarantees the value fits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
